facebook.caption:
Tourists skip this. Locals know better.

Basket boat spinning on open water. Kayak cutting through mangroves. This is Phu Quoc that the resort brochures don't show you.

Dynasty Phu Quoc runs both tours out of ấp 2, Phú Quốc. Rated 4.9 stars across 352 reviews. That number doesn't lie.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
